steps.title: Use the similarity clue
steps.content: Zhao used information about ants to reason about light particles in snow because the two systems share broad similarities. The needed phrase names a comparison between different things based on shared features.

steps.title: Discard unrelated nouns
steps.content: A would mean working with someone, but the sentence describes a method of comparison. B means an add-on, and C means opposition; neither fits the similarity clue. The answer is D.
